name: nexusclaw-rag
description: OpenClaw-compatible NexusClaw scene agent runtime with RAG support

interface.shortDescription: Run NexusClaw workflow cases and grounded RAG from OpenClaw
interface.longDescription: Adds NexusClaw scene workflow control, field collection, PDF and mail actions, grounded knowledge search, and health checks to a local OpenClaw deployment via MCP tools and bundled skills.
defaultPrompt: Ask NexusClaw how to handle a Hong Kong permit workflow.
Start a NexusClaw scene case, collect the missing fields, and generate the PDF.
Search the knowledge base and cite the top matching policy document.
Check whether the local NexusClaw workflow and RAG stack are healthy.
